---
title: "New and updated data from MoBa"
format: html
date: 03/05/2026
date-format: full
---

**Data updates.**

We are in the process of gradually releasing new data that we have received.

Today we are releasing new and updated data from MoBa.

Updated data:
- MoBaUng
- Ungdom kosthold
- Q4–Q6

New data:
- Q18 years
- Q19 years
- Q20 years

For the new data please note that the number of individuals is small due to ongoing data collection.
